title: Carole/Samara to reply on VCP contract sent
Update reconcile cron to 10am/2pm/4pm/10pm ET in routines UI
narrative: Redistribute 4 reconcile runs for better day-long coverage (Option A). New cron (EDT Mar-Nov): `0 14,18,20,2 * * *` = 10am / 2pm / 4pm / 10pm ET daily. EST flip (Nov-Mar): `0 15,19,21,3 * * *`. Replaces current `0 11,16,22,2 * * *` which wasted fires on 7am (duplicates 6:57am Morning Brief drain) and 6pm (duplicates 6:03pm EOD drain). New schedule fills weekday afternoon gap (3:23pm SC → 6:03pm EOD) via 4pm reconcile, keeps weekend afternoon coverage. After applying in routines UI, update prompts/reconcile.md line 3 to match. Set calendar reminder for Nov DST flip.

title: Confirm 10pm reconcile drained pending queue
narrative: Verify tonight's 10pm ET reconcile ran successfully and drained the 4 pending cloud actions queued on 2026-04-16: (1) mark PA-60 done — Carole/Samara INQ entity confirmed; (2) mark PA-10 done — VCP contract sent; (3) add_task — Carole/Samara to reply on VCP contract (follow_up, due Apr 21, PA-new); (4) add_task — redistribute reconcile crons (self, PA-new). Check: vault/cloud-actions.jsonl should be empty (or contain only errored entries); git log should show a `reconcile: applied 4 cloud actions, cache resynced` commit around 10pm-10:15pm ET Apr 16; Notion Active Items view should show PA-60 and PA-10 as done, and the 2 new PA- items present. If the reconcile didn't run or left items errored, investigate via routines UI run history.

title: Email Ash at Climate Door re: potential PE intros — send investment criteria
narrative: Ash (ash@climatedoor.com, Climate Door) left a voicemail ~5 days ago (around Apr 11) saying he has companies looking for a private equity partner and wants to make an introduction. He gave his email for follow-up. Action: reply with Sidecar's investment criteria, ask whether any of the companies he has in mind look like a fit, and if so propose getting a call on the calendar to meet. Thank him for thinking of us and for reaching out.

title: Get JSN protector course information
narrative: Pull full details on JSN's protector course: curriculum, prerequisites, registration process/deadline, cost, format confirmation. Known so far: next cohort starts September 2026; structure is 10 weeks at 3 hrs/week (one session per week), then 3 hrs once a month thereafter as ongoing. Registration window closes within ~1 month (by mid-May 2026). Need this info before discussing with Leore.

title: Ask Leore about taking JSN protector course
narrative: Discuss with Leore whether to register for JSN's protector course. Next cohort starts September 2026; 10 weeks × 3 hrs/week, plus 3 hrs/month ongoing after. Registration needed within the next ~month (by mid-May 2026). Pair with the 'Get JSN protector course information' task so details are in hand before the conversation.

title: Update PA agent to capture personal email via Notion pages
